params.name: Wish Scroll
params.source:
Draw 2000 times from the Lottery Machine to unlock the [[Value Packs#Lottery_Value_Pack|Value Pack]] to obtain this relic. 

<u>Note:</u> The Value Pack costs {{RewardIcon|W-Tad}}6000 W-Tads
params.description: Fate's mercy wove a mortal's lost soul into parchment - write in blood, and desires manifest. But beware: every granted wish is a gamble with destiny, for all gifts come with a hidden price.
params.ss1:
